seoTitle: Sandy Gully vs Sandy Hollow — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sandy Gully and Sandy Hollow. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sandy Gully vs Sandy Hollow: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sandy Gully and Sandy Hollow.
heading: Sandy Gully vs Sandy Hollow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sandy Gully, New South Wales and Sandy Hollow, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sandy Gully has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Sandy Hollow (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sandy Gully or Sandy Hollow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sandy Gully has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Sandy Hollow scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sandy Gully scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Sandy Hollow scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sandy Gully or Sandy Hollow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sandy Gully has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
